caption: A man with dark hair and a blue button-down shirt stands before a black backdrop featuring the white and red logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". In the initial scene, he holds up a book titled "Spark Cookbook," which features a cover image of a cloudy sky. He is wearing a small headset microphone. As the sequence progresses, he lowers the book and places it on a dark table in front of him while speaking. A small white hexagonal logo for "NFOBJECTS" is visible in the bottom left corner. In the final scene, a blue graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the frame containing the text "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", "CEO", and "infoObjects", accompanied by a 3D blue cube icon. The man remains the central focus, gesturing and talking throughout the duration of the clip.
